news.title: China warns about AI risks with Anthropic's Claude Code
news.description:

It comes as the U.S.-China tech race intensifies, with Anthropic last month blaming Chinese…

news.title: China's industry regulator flags 'backdoor' risk in Claude Code
news.description: China’s industry regulator has flagged security risks in Claude Code, an artificial intelligence programming tool developed by US startup Anthropic, warning that certain versions could expose sensitive user information through unauthorized data transmission.
